About

10+ years on the biggest stages

A 10+ year sports broadcasting veteran, Collin Harmon has covered many of the biggest sporting events in the world. He has anchored coverage from multiple Super Bowls, Final Fours, College Football Playoffs, the World Series, and the NBA Finals.

Away from the major events, he has sat down with Hall of Famers across multiple sports — including Shaq, Eric Dickerson, Diana Taurasi, and Michael Phelps.

From emceeing a Pro Bowl festival in front of 10,000+ fans alongside Cameron Jordan and Marcus Mariota, to field reporting at the chaotic WM Phoenix Open, to anchoring a highly successful weekly college football show with College Football Hall of Famer and two-time Super Bowl champion Mark May, Collin has proven he can command any format — studio desk, live field, one-on-one interview, or arena stage. Whatever the sport, whatever the moment, he delivers.

Super Bowl NBA Finals World Series Final Four CFB Playoff National Championship PGA Tour Pro Bowl All-Star Game
